payload: Revisit MAX_CONSECUTIVE_ERRORS (5 to 8) for RPC resilience. This has been deferred for two cycles — should be reviewed when production RPC reliability data is available.
After DB is restored in production, verify that phase timing data appears correctly in the /api/health response. Check that phase_durations_s is present in the cycle stats history.

Add a frontend component to display the whale score breakdown (all 5 sub-scores) in the wallet detail view. The backend endpoint GET /api/wallets/{wallet_id}/score returns all scoring data needed. The ScoreModal component already exists in Walleys.jsx — this task is about surfacing it more prominently.
